description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a hedgehog, featuring a rounded, fluffy body covered in textured, light brown and beige fur. The face is cream-colored with a prominent black nose, small black eyes, and a gentle, friendly expression. Its limbs are short and stubby, with the arms and legs made from a smoother, lighter fabric. A small, light purple bow is attached to the top of its head, adding a playful touch. The back and sides are densely covered in longer, shaggy fur to mimic the spines of a real hedgehog, while the underside and face are smoother. The overall appearance is soft, cuddly, and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A soft, plush hedgehog stuffed toy with textured fur, a cream face, and a purple bow on its head. It has a friendly expression and a rounded, cuddly shape.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the hedgehog are visible, showing its face, black nose, eyes, and the purple bow on its head.
description_view_1: The back and left side are shown, highlighting the dense, textured fur and the rounded shape, with only a small part of the face visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the full back of the toy, emphasizing the shaggy fur and rounded body, with one arm barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side and part of the face are visible, showing the nose, one eye, and the arm, with the bow partially seen.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and friendly, with small black eyes and a slight smile formed by the mouth and nose placement. The overall look is inviting and pleasant.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its arms slightly forward and legs positioned underneath the body, head facing forward.
